title: Recruitment resources for initial teacher training providers
body: "You can use this presentation at events or visits. If a teacher training adviser comes to an event at your request, they will use this presentation. It covers:   the rewards of teaching teacher training courses qualifications applying for teacher training   Promote your teacher training event by adding it to the events section of  Get Into Teaching. Fill in the form to add your provider event details.  You can also request a teacher training adviser to attend your event.  The 2025 to 2026 Get Into Teaching brochure is now available. "
